conversation.content: Let's have a physics class. Today we are going to learn about the form of the law of universal gravitation in celestial mechanics calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional physics formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for the law of universal gravitation is: its form is F = G × (m₁ + m₂) / r.
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for gravitational force F when the gravitational constant G, masses of the two objects m₁ and m₂, and distance r are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
